aiInstructions:
Support group by in GQL.

Route questions about KPIs, aggregates, or named metrics (e.g. "average P/E", "total market cap," any measure from the semantic model) to the semantic model. Route questions involving relationships between securities — sector comparisons, correlation/diversification, portfolio holdings, financial history across years — to the ontology.

A security's value_score property (on the Security entity) is the definitive value-screening measure — a sector-relative composite of P/E, P/B, and ROE percentile ranks. Don't compute a different definition of "undervalued" from raw ratios directly.
